creator: stephen@cauchy.math.missouri.edu
text:
In compiling the dvipdfm-0.13.2b port one gets errors that patch-aa
does not apply cleanly.

Fix: 

Please remove patch-aa (or the directory files).

I should add that when I sent the PR updating dvipdfm, the diffs
file included the line:

Only in dvipdfm-orig: files

Does the process for updating the ports take these lines into
account?
